mapper.select:
SELECT it.id, it.warehouse_id, it.location_id, it.materiel_id, it.batch_no, it.qty, it.unit, it.stock_status, it.is_deleted, it.create_time, it.create_username, it.update_time, it.update_username, w.warehouse_code AS warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name AS warehouse_name, wl.location_code AS location_code, wl.group_no AS group_no, wl.row_no AS row_no, wl.layer_no AS layer_no, wl.column_no AS column_no, m.materiel AS materiel_code, m.materiel_desc AS materiel_desc FROM sp_inventory it LEFT JOIN sp_warehouse w ON it.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN sp_warehouse_location wl ON it.location_id = wl.id LEFT JOIN sp_materile m ON it.materiel_id = m.id WHERE it.is_deleted = '0'
AND it.warehouse_id = #{req.warehouseId}
AND (m.materiel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.materielLike}, '%') OR m.materiel_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.materielLike}, '%'))
AND wl.location_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.locationCodeLike}, '%')
AND it.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.batchNoLike}, '%')
AND it.stock_status = #{req.stockStatus}
ORDER BY it.update_time DESC

SELECT it.id, it.warehouse_id, it.location_id, it.materiel_id, it.batch_no, it.qty, it.unit, it.stock_status, wl.location_code AS location_code, wl.group_no AS group_no, wl.row_no AS row_no, wl.layer_no AS layer_no, wl.column_no AS column_no, m.materiel AS materiel_code, m.materiel_desc AS materiel_desc FROM sp_inventory it LEFT JOIN sp_warehouse_location wl ON it.location_id = wl.id LEFT JOIN sp_materile m ON it.materiel_id = m.id WHERE it.is_deleted = '0' AND it.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} ORDER BY wl.group_no, wl.row_no, wl.layer_no, wl.column_no
